package rulecoverage

func PositiveJwtSecretInSource() string {
    ruleID := "jwt_secret_in_source"
    family := "security"
    severity := "error"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodHS256, claims).SignedString([]byte(\"hardcoded\"))` where the signing key is a string literal"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
